hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "Pre-push reminder: Have you run /agent-army:quality-gate? Consider running it before pushing to ensure code quality."}'
echo '{"systemMessage": "Reminder: Verify Clean Architecture compliance — dependencies must point inward only."}'

PostToolUse.matcher: Bash(npm install*|yarn add*|pnpm add*|pip install*|go get*|cargo add*)

hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "New dependency added. Verify: 1) License compatibility 2) Known CVEs (npm audit / pip-audit) 3) Bundle size impact 4) Is it actively maintained?"}'
echo '{"systemMessage": "Before stopping: Have all reports been filed in docs/reports/? Is docs/INDEX.md updated?"}'
